bookCalendar.headerSubtitle: Jelle's calendar · Select date and time
bookCalendar.successBody: Jelle will be notified. We'll let you know by email and notification when they confirm, propose another time or can't make that day.
bookCalendar.rules: Each shoot lasts ~{duration}h. After that there's {buffer}h of buffer for Jelle to travel. Maximum {max} shoots/day. Hours: 09:30–15:00.
bookCalendar.selectDayHint: You'll see the available times here
bookCalendar.dayFull: Day full ({max}/{max} shoots). Press Special request below if it's urgent.
bookCalendar.bufferHint: Amber slots are blocked by buffer ({buffer}h around each shoot).
bookCalendar.extraordinaryWarning: Special request. You skip the standard rules (hours, buffer or daily cap). Jelle decides case by case. Explain the reason in notes.
bookCalendar.mapsLinkHint: Helps Jelle find the exact house. Paste it from the Google Maps app → Share → Copy link.
bookCalendar.reasonPlaceholder: €12M villa, owner only available that day...
bookCalendar.notesPlaceholder: Access, gate code, better light in the afternoon, etc.
bookCalendar.needException: I need something outside the rules (Special request)

calendar.disconnectConfirm: Are you sure you want to disconnect your Google Calendar? Shoots already created won't be deleted.
calendar.notConfiguredDesc: The admin hasn't connected the project credentials in Google Cloud yet. As soon as they are, this box will turn into a button to connect your calendar.
calendar.selectorHelp: It only syncs with this calendar. If you have a separate one for CBI (e.g. CBI JELLE PHOTOS), choose it here and your private calendar won't be touched.
calendar.connectDesc: Every shoot you confirm will appear in your Calendar (mobile included). Your personal events will automatically block those slots for agents.
calendar.errorNoRefreshToken: Google didn't return permanent permission. Disconnect this app in your Google account and try again.

connections.title: Social network connections
connections.intro: Once you connect each platform with its real credentials (OAuth), posts will be sent directly from here. For now, connecting an account marks the platform as available for scheduling posts (actual sending is pending until the API integration).

help.instagram: Requires a Business account linked to a Facebook page. Connect via the Meta Graph API (long-lived token).
help.youtube: YouTube channel connected via YouTube Data API v3 (OAuth). Ideal for automatic Shorts.
help.tiktok: Requires app approval in TikTok Developers to use the Content Posting API.

connections.webhookYoutube: receives notifications of new videos via PubSubHubbub

training.commitmentStatement: I am {name}. I am a top-performing property agent on the Costa Blanca. I find listings that others miss. I close deals that others don't. In 90 days I will make my first sale. I commit to showing up every day, knocking every door, and doing the work — no matter what.
training.commitmentIntro: This is not a training programme. This is a commitment to yourself. The agents who follow this plan get their first sale. The ones who don't — don't. It's that simple.
training.readOutLoud: Read this out loud. Not in your head. Out loud.
training.saidItOutLoud: I said it out loud. I mean it.
training.passwordMinChars: Password must be at least 6 characters
training.agentsLuckyToHaveYou: Your agents are lucky to have you.
training.goMakeOneBetter: Now go make one of them better today.
training.oneThingMakeAgentBetter: What is the ONE thing you can do today to make one agent better?
training.notFiveAgents: Not five agents. One agent. One thing. That's how trust is built.
training.whichAgentPlaceholder: Which agent? What will you do?
training.winToCelebrate: What's a win to celebrate with the team today?
training.smallWinsCulture: First door knock. First appointment. First listing signed. Anything. Small wins build a winning culture.
training.oneThingFirstSale: What is the ONE thing you will do today that moves you closer to your first sale?
training.nowGoDoIt: Now go do it. Come back tonight.
training.eveningDonePlaceholder: What happened? What did you learn?
training.eveningNotDonePlaceholder: What got in the way? What will you do differently tomorrow?
training.noAgentsYet: No agents yet. Create agents from the Admin dashboard.
